target.title: Fix stale auto-fallback origin model selection
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a shared stale auto-fallback-origin classifier so reply and agent-command selection agree when recorded fallback origin no longer matches the current primary.
- Defers reply-side model/auth cleanup until after read-only slash/inline actions have dispatched and a real run is about to start.
- Guards deferred reply cleanup against post-selection session changes so mixed `/model ...` directives and concurrent row updates are not overwritten.
- Prepares agent-command attempts with stale fallback model/auth cleared in memory, then persists durable cleanup only after a successful visible run and only if the store row still exactly matches the stale fallback pin captured at selection time.

## Maintainer feedback addressed
- One prepared selection result now carries reset reason and persistence behavior through the reply turn.
- Stale-origin repair no longer emits the disallowed-allowlist reset event.
- Preserve-state/non-mutating agent-command runs strip fallback auth for the primary attempt without writing durable cleanup.
- Deferred reply cleanup is guarded against concurrent user model switches and mixed inline model directives.
- Direct agent-command cleanup captures the stale row fields at selection time and refuses to persist if the current store row has changed to a different stale auto-fallback pin.
- Auto-reply and agent-command test doubles now satisfy the new deferred cleanup/model-selection helper contract used by CI.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: stale auto-fallback model pins whose recorded fallback origin no longer matches the current primary were being treated as active stored overrides; the fix prepares the primary selection for the next real run and defers durable cleanup until the run boundary without overwriting user-owned or newer auto-owned model changes made after selection.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on branch `codex/92776-prepared-model-selection-boundary`, commit `519c178965`, running the patched runtime module through Node 24 with `tsx` from the repository dependencies.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran `node --import tsx --input-type=module` from the repository root and imported `isStaleAutoFallbackOriginOverride` from the patched source. The command exercised the direct cleanup risk ClawSweeper identified: a stale row changed to a different stale auto-fallback pin before cleanup.
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): copied terminal output from the live Node command:

```json
{
  "proof": "direct-stale-auto-fallback-exact-row-guard",
  "head": "519c178965",
  "oldBroadPredicate": {
    "capturedStale": true,
    "changedRowStillStale": true
  },
  "exactGuard": {
    "capturedMatches": true,
    "changedMatches": false
  },
  "observedResult": "changed stale row remains stale under the broad predicate but fails the exact captured-row guard, so direct cleanup shouldPersist refuses to persist cleared model/auth fields."
}
```

- Observed result after fix: the unchanged captured stale pin can be cleaned up, but if the direct-session row changes to a different stale auto-fallback pin before cleanup, the exact guard fails and cleanup does not persist cleared model/auth fields over the newer row.
- What was not tested: no live external provider API call was sent; this proof exercises the local OpenClaw stale-origin classifier and direct cleanup guard boundary.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof uses redacted throwaway session fields to avoid publishing real auth profile names.
- Before evidence: ClawSweeper review on this PR identified that the previous direct cleanup `shouldPersist` accepted any stale auto-fallback row, so a different stale row could still be overwritten.

## Verification
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.test-fixtures.ts src/commands/agent-command.test-mocks.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.before-agent-reply.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.fast-path.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.message-hooks.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agent.test.ts
- node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.model.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:core
- pnpm tsgo:test:src
- pnpm lint:core
- CI=1 pnpm check:changed -- --base upstream/main --head HEAD

Fixes #92776
Supersedes #92790
target.author: turbotheturtle
